title: Step 3: Initiator locks tCeBM-CRC via HTLC
description: Costa Rica locks 1,000,000 tCeBM-CRC with a hashLock. The hashLock is SHA-256('cbweb3-test-secret-2026') = 0x7f83b1657ff1fc53b92dc18148a1d65dfc2d4b1fa3d677284addd200126d9069.
notes: The secret 'cbweb3-test-secret-2026' is synthetic and used only for testing. timeLock is set to 1740000000 (Unix timestamp, ~2025-02-19T20:00:00Z).
